title: Solana Smart Money Tracker
description: Identify high-alpha Solana wallets using GoldRush: fetch recent token buys via transaction history, calculate realized PnL from decoded swap history, and surface wallets with consistently profitable trades (>2x average return over 30 days). Once you have a watchlist, subscribe to their real-time activity stream to receive instant push notifications the moment they buy a new token — before it shows up on Dexscreener. Build a Solana copy-trading radar, alpha group feed, or smart-money signal layer for your trading agent.
useCase: Build a Solana copy-trading radar that identifies consistently profitable wallets and sends real-time alerts the moment they buy a new token.

keyParams.address: The Solana wallet address to analyze for smart money signals
keyParams.page_size: Number of transactions to analyze (use 100 for sufficient history)
keyParams.page: Page number to paginate through 30-day transaction history
